html:
2026-0253
2026-03-25ISEDCompetition ActAppointment of the Commissioner of Competition, on an interim basisAppointment of Jeanne Pratt of Ottawa, Ontario, a Deputy Commissioner, to exercise the powers and perform the duties of the Commissioner of Competition on an interim basis, to hold office for a term of one year or until such time as a new Commissioner of Competition is appointed, whichever occurs first.N/A
subject: Appointment of the Commissioner of Competition, on an interim basis
precis: Appointment of Jeanne Pratt of Ottawa, Ontario, a Deputy Commissioner, to exercise the powers and perform the duties of the Commissioner of Competition on an interim basis, to hold office for a term of one year or until such time as a new Commissioner of Competition is appointed, whichever occurs first.
